StringData.String: {%heroName%}, welcome to Dragon Age Legends!
Move your mouse over this monster to see your options, then click to attack.
Good work! You used your basic attack. Attacks are the key to victory!
Ouch, that Hurlock packed a punch. Heal your hero before your next attack.
Incredible! You defeated that Hurlock with a well placed critical hit.
The Hurlock was hoarding gold and a shock bomb. Click to pick them up.
When your hero is low on health, you can drink health potions for +{HEART,4}
Heroes can both drink a potion and attack on their turn.
Yikes, it's Soleil! Fortunately we have a friend to recruit and help out.
Click the Fight button to begin!
Let's take care of these Hurlocks first. Use the shock bomb you looted
Now use your friend's skill to summon a drake
You got lucky this time, but we'll meet again in the Planasene Forest!
Wow, you scared off Soleil! I fear she won't be that easy next time though, so let's continue moving toward your castle.
Heroes and monsters take turns attacking based on their Agility.
See whose turn is coming up next by looking at the Turn Queue.
You can recruit up to two friends into each battle. Try it now!
Let's take care of these Hurlocks first. Use the shock bomb you looted.
Now use your friend's skill to down lightning on all your enemies.
Your hero needs mana to use skills. Drink a mana potion for +{MANA,1}{MANA,1}
Click on the skill icon to use your new skill.
Good work! You just used {%skillName%} to deal more damage.
As your hero levels up, you will learn a wide variety of unique skills.
{%heroName%}, you are now prepared to begin your Legendary adventure.
Remember to recruit friends, use bombs, potions and skills. Good luck!
When you earn enough XP, your hero will Level Up.
Invest in one of these five Stats and your hero's might will grow.
Each time you level up, you can learn a new skill or upgrade an existing one.
Try it now by learning {%skillName%}.
Dragon Age Legends is even more fun with friends!
You can invite friends to join your Legendary Adventure at any time.
{%heroName%}, as promised, here is my gift to you.
I am giving you one of my old estates.
Customize your new castle with the options on the right.
Let me show you how to build rooms in your castle.
Drag and drop this worker room into your castle to hire a worker.
You need workers to craft bombs, potions and kits for your adventure.
Good work! Now build an apothecary to craft potions.
Now, click on a stool to have your worker start crafting a health potion.
Choose the amount of health potions you would like your worker to craft.
Now that your worker is busy, let's continue your Legendary Adventure!
{%heroName%}, I have a new quest for you. Click here to find out more.
{%heroName%}, you have finished a quest. Click here to collect your rewards.
Please sell excess items until you are within your inventory limit.
We are nearly to your estate, {%firstName%}, but our path is blocked by darkspawn. Get ready for battle!
You cannot defeat these monsters alone. Bring us into battle! Recruit your friends to ensure victory.
Use your basic attack to damage this Hurlock.
Now it is Derandt's turn. Use his Frostbite skill to freeze the Emissary in place for four turns.
This is the turn queue. It indicates the order of actions in combat.
Now, use my Overrun skill to attack the first row of enemies with a single swipe.
Finish off the rest of them however you like. A few basic attacks will suffice.
Bombs don't end your turn, so throw a Shock Bomb now, then attack!
Continue using your attacks, skills, and bombs to defeat these monsters!
Derandt can summon a powerful Bronto, but he is out of mana. Have him drink a mana potion first.
Now summon the Bronto and witness its destructive might!
Ouch, getting low on health here! Healing potions will help you and your allies recover health. Use one now.
Great teamwork! We defeated the fearsome drake. Collect your rewards, and I can show you your estate.
